title: How Soon Is Now?
why_this_song: How Soon Is Now? by The Smiths (1985) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I am the son and the heir"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Oh, shut your mouth, how can you say"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Oh, shut your mouth, how can you say"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "I go about things the wrong way?"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "I go about things the wrong way?"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I go about things the wrong way?
I am human and I need to be loved
I am the son and the heir
Of a shyness that is criminally vulgar
I am the son and heir

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "heir" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "heir" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "shut" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "shut" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I am the son and the heir
Of a shyness that is criminally vulgar
And you leave on your own

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "How Soon Is Now?" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "How Soon Is Now?" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "How Soon Is Now?" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "How Soon Is Now?" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "How Soon Is Now?" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "How Soon Is Now?"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
